title: A Globe-Spanning Collection of Children’s Art May Lose Its Home
summary_full: For 40 years, a museum in Norway has showcased art by children from around the world, even toddlers. Now it has lost the state support it depended on.
summary_public: For 40 years, a museum in Norway has showcased art by children from around the world, even toddlers. Now it has lost the state support it depended on.
